info.title: DeepResearch API
info.description: An agentic research assistant API for discovering, saving, and interacting with academic papers. Features a novel 3-agent pipeline (classifier + optimiser → summariser → chat) powered by Google Gemini, with paper discovery via OpenAlex semantic search. Built with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and SQLite.

post.summary: Save a paper to the library
post.description:
Save a paper to the library. Automatically extracts full text from the
PDF (if available) and generates an AI summary via the Gemini summariser.
Both extraction and summarisation are best-effort and never block the save.

409.description: Paper with this OpenAlex ID already saved

get.description:
List all saved papers, optionally filtered by tag. Results are ordered
by creation date (newest first).

Get a specific saved paper by its database ID. Returns the full paper
record including extracted text and AI summary.

put.description:
Update the tags or notes on a saved paper. Only fields included in the
request body are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

delete.description:
Remove a paper from the library. This also deletes any associated
conversation history.

get.description:
Find papers related to a saved paper by querying OpenAlex using the
paper's concepts. Returns up to 5 related works, excluding the original.

schema.title: Response Related Papers Papers  Paper Id  Related Get

get.description:
Run the full agentic search pipeline: classify the academic field,
optimise the query for better retrieval, then perform a semantic search
via the OpenAlex API. Returns both the agent analysis and search results.

422.description: Validation error — query parameter is required

500.description: OpenAlex API or Gemini agent failure

post.description:
Summarise any academic text using the Gemini summariser agent.
Pass an abstract for a quick preview, or the full paper text for a
comprehensive summary.

422.description: Validation error — text field is required and must not be empty

post.description:
Send a message about a saved paper and receive an AI response. The chat
agent uses the paper's full text (or abstract) as context. Messages are
persisted to maintain multi-turn conversation history.

get.description: Get the full conversation history for a paper, ordered chronologically.

delete.description: Clear all conversation messages for a paper, allowing a fresh start.

get.description: Check the API is running and responsive.

examples.summary: This paper introduces the Transformer, a novel architecture that relies entirely on self-attention mechanisms. It achieves state-of-the-art results on machine translation benchmarks while being more parallelisable and requiring significantly less training time.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Agentic search pipeline: classify the academic field, optimise the query, and retrieve papers from OpenAlex via semantic search.

tags.name: Papers
tags.description: CRUD operations for the saved paper library — save, list, retrieve, update, and delete academic papers.

tags.name: Summarisation
tags.description: AI-powered summarisation of academic text using the Gemini summariser agent.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Multi-turn conversation about a saved paper, powered by the Gemini chat agent.
